description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. The individual is dressed in a textured jacket and matching shorts, both featuring a woven or patterned appearance, layered over a shirt. The footwear consists of high-top shoes or boots, and the legs are bare from the knees down. The figure's hair is shoulder-length, styled with a center part and gentle waves. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult with a patterned jacket, shorts, and high-top shoes, standing with arms outstretched and shoulder-length wavy hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, jacket, shorts, shirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered clothing, and the high-top shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, shorts, and the full length of the hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with visible details of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: textured jacket and shorts set over a shirt, casual urban style
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length wavy hair with a center part
